scripts.test:e2e:preflight: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_IGNORE_HTTPS_ERRORS=1 NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 npm run test:e2e:stack-preflight && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_IGNORE_HTTPS_ERRORS=1 NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 PLAYWRIGHT_RETRIES=0 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=10000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=test-results/preflight-results.json E2E_FAIL_ON_SKIPS=1 node scripts/e2e-runner.mjs --project=chromium --grep @preflight --reporter=list,json,html
scripts.test:e2e:preflight:only: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_RETRIES=0 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=120000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=10000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=test-results/preflight-results.json E2E_FAIL_ON_SKIPS=1 node scripts/e2e-runner.mjs --project=chromium --grep @preflight --reporter=list,json,html
scripts.test:e2e:ci-fast: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:32123 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_RETRIES=0 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=20000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=7000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure node scripts/e2e-guard.mjs --project=chromium --grep @smoke --grep-invert "@fullstack|@oauth" && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:32123 PLAYWRIGHT_REUSE_EXISTING_SERVER=0 PLAYWRIGHT_RETRIES=0 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=20000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=7000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure playwright test --project=chromium --grep @smoke --grep-invert "@fullstack|@oauth"
scripts.test:e2e:fullstack:ci: npm run test:e2e:preflight && npm run test:e2e:fullstack:critical
scripts.test:e2e:fullstack:critical: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_RETRIES=0 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=240000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure PLAYWRIGHT_JSON_OUTPUT_NAME=test-results/fullstack-critical-results.json E2E_FAIL_ON_SKIPS=1 node scripts/e2e-runner.mjs --project=chromium --grep "(?=.*@fullstack)(?=.*@critical)" --reporter=list,json,html
scripts.test:e2e:debug: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_RETRIES=0 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=45000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=12000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=on playwright test --project=chromium
scripts.test:e2e:fullstack:debug: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_RETRIES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=45000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=12000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=on-first-retry playwright test --project=chromium --grep @fullstack
scripts.test:e2e:p0: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=360000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure npm run test:e2e:stack-preflight && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=360000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure playwright test --project=chromium e2e/p0 --grep @p0-app
scripts.test:e2e:p0:fast: cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=360000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure npm run test:e2e:stack-preflight && cross-env PLAYWRIGHT_SKIP_WEBSERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_MAX_FAILURES=1 PLAYWRIGHT_WORKERS=1 PLAYWRIGHT_TEST_TIMEOUT_MS=360000 PLAYWRIGHT_EXPECT_TIMEOUT_MS=15000 PLAYWRIGHT_TRACE=retain-on-failure playwright test --project=chromium e2e/p0 --grep @p0-app-fast
